summary.summary: Bumps APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4.13 to 0.8.4.14 (see diff:e6d30f10d8f1 and file:e6a5c4a62a66). The commit message records this CI/version bump (commit:362e4e7660df).
summary.userFacingImpact: Likely none: the change only updates a development/version constant in Config.xcconfig and does not modify application code or behavior as shown in the diff (diff:e6d30f10d8f1, file:e6a5c4a62a66).
